Issues: The image relies heavily on simple, atmospheric composition. While mood imagery is commercially viable, the technical execution is very basic, which might limit its appeal to buyers looking for high-detail digital art.
The aesthetic is generic (moody city scape/sunset) and does not possess a strong unique visual hook that sets it apart from millions of similar images already available online.
The lines and shapes are simplified. For commercial high-end art sales, increased complexity, refined textures, or a stronger artistic signature would significantly increase perceived value.
